# Gymnasia

> OpenAI Gymnasium environments implemented in pure Rust. Provides CartPole and MountainCar classical control environments with an optional macroquad rendering backend. Designed as a drop-in Rust alternative to Gymnasium for reinforcement learning research and experimentation.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/README.md): Installation, usage, and examples
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [USAGE](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/USAGE.md): Detailed setup instructions

## API / Key Files

- [src/core/](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/src/core/): `Env`, `Renderable`, `StepResult`, and `Flatten` traits/types
- [src/envs/classical_control/cartpole.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/src/envs/classical_control/cartpole.rs): CartPole environment
- [src/envs/classical_control/mountain_car.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/src/envs/classical_control/mountain_car.rs): MountainCar environment
- [src/spaces/](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/src/spaces/): `BoxSpace<B: Bounded>`, `Discrete`, `MultiDiscrete`, `MultiBinary`
- [src/wrappers/](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/src/wrappers/): 13 composable wrappers (`TimeLimit`, `ClipAction`, `NormalizeObservation`, etc.)
- [src/render/](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/src/render/): `RenderEnv`, `DrawList`, macroquad backend (feature-gated)

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/gymnasia/blob/main/skills/gymnasia/SKILL.md): Agent skill
